scaffold.notes: Tauri 2 + React + Vite + Python sidecar, cargo check + tsc clean

bento_layout.notes: CSS grid, context panel + 2x2 agent grid + user terminal

pty_bridge.notes: Read/write path wired in Rust + React hook; not end-to-end with real agents

launch_sequence.notes: Auto-spawn agents from harness.toml on app start

pty_sidecar_pipe.notes: Route PTY stdout to Python sidecar for signal parsing

pty_resize.notes: Call fitAddon.fit() + Tauri resize on pane dimension change

token_bars.notes: ContextPanel renders from store; needs live data

status_dots.notes: Driven by agent.status in store; needs live signals
